title: AU Small Finance Bank Capital India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
company: AU Small Finance Bank Capital India

jsonLd.title: AU Small Finance Bank Capital India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
AU Small Finance Bank Capital India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Credit Analyst at our Chennai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About AU Small Finance Bank Capital India:
AU Small Finance Bank Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AU Small Finance Bank Capital India!
